pseudoboehmite.name: Pseudoboehmite
pseudoboehmite.description: High-purity pseudoboehmite for catalyst support and adsorbent applications. Excellent thermal stability and surface area.

microcrystallineAlumina.name: Microcrystalline Alumina
microcrystallineAlumina.description: Fine-grained microcrystalline alumina for ceramic and refractory applications. Superior hardness and wear resistance.

aluminaCarrier.name: Alumina Carrier
aluminaCarrier.description: Specialized alumina carriers for catalyst applications. Customizable pore structure and surface properties.

aluminaMicrospheres.name: Alumina Microspheres
aluminaMicrospheres.description: Precision alumina microspheres for fluid catalytic cracking and petrochemical applications. Uniform particle size distribution.
